news.headline: Global Electric Actuators Market is set to grow by USD 4.26 billion from 2024-2028, with a 4.9% CAGR as AI shapes trends.

Estimates suggest a substantial increase of USD 4.26 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.9% during this period.

news.headline: Orchid Island Capital declares $0.12/share October dividend, payable Nov. 27 to holders on record as of Oct. 31. Next dividend to be announced Nov. 13.
news.summary: In Vero Beach, Florida, on October 16, 2024, Orchid Island Capital, Inc. (NYSE: ORC) released news that the Board of Directors has approved a monthly cash dividend of $0.12 per share for October 2024. Shareholders of record as of October 31, 2024, will receive the payout on November 27, 2024. The ex-dividend date is also October 31, 2024. The Company is scheduled to announce its upcoming common stock dividend on November 13, 2024.

news.headline: Lend Bucket launches Credit Builder Program to boost businesses' credit by 100+ points in 2-3 months, reporting to 3 major credit bureaus for better loan terms and growth opportunities.
news.summary: Lend Bucket has launched a Credit Builder Program aimed at boosting business credit scores by over 100 points in 2-3 months. The program offers three tiers and reports to major credit bureaus—Experian, Dun & Bradstreet, and Equifax. Improving business credit is crucial for accessing larger loans with better terms, separating personal and business finances, enhancing vendor relationships, and negotiating deals effectively. This program in Corpus Christi, TX, offers opportunities for business growth and financial stability through improved credit.

news.summary: Centific, a tech company based in Redmond, Washington, announced a partnership on October 16, 2024, with Intel and Denvr Dataworks to offer industries such as energy, consumer, retail, and healthcare the opportunity to utilize their private data for inference use cases. This collaboration aims to provide cutting-edge AI innovation at a low initial cost.

news.headline: Celularity acquired Rebound product from Sequence LifeScience Inc., expanding its biomaterial portfolio. Oct 16, 2024. Nasdaq: CELU.
news.summary: In Florham Park, New Jersey, on October 16, 2024, Celularity Inc. (Nasdaq: CELU), a regenerative and cellular medicine firm, revealed the expansion of its commercial offerings by acquiring Rebound, a full thickness placental-derived allograft matrix product. The product was acquired from Sequence LifeScience, Inc. This strategic move enhances Celularity's portfolio of advanced biomaterial products derived from placenta for medical applications.

news.headline: Helium company reveals private placement offering for potential investors.
news.summary: The latest update reveals that over 100 people have tested positive for COVID-19 in the city, bringing the total number of cases to nearly 500. Additionally, 10 new fatalities have been reported, increasing the death toll to 25. The local hospitals are currently treating 50 patients in serious condition, with 5 of them requiring intensive care. Authorities have emphasized the importance of following preventative measures such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing to curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Caracal and I2Pure collaborate to launch new disinfection and antimicrobial products; Caracal is a certified MBE and Tier 1 supplier.

Caracal, a certified Minority Business Enterprise and Tier 1 diversity spend supplier, specializes in providing a diverse range of high-quality products and value-added services to organizations of all sizes. They have strong connections in various sectors such as healthcare, insurance, and financial services. This collaboration aims to bring cutting-edge solutions to the market and cater to a wide range of clients.

news.headline: Historia unveils debut NFT collection, centered on Armenia's Carahunge site, marking a leap in cultural heritage preservation.
news.summary: A new NFT collection has been launched by the cultural heritage preservation platform, with a focus on Armenia's ancient Carahunge site. This marks the platform's inaugural NFT release and aims to highlight the historical significance of the site. Carahunge, often referred to as "Armenia's Stonehenge," dates back to approximately 5,500 years ago and consists of over 200 standing stones arranged in circular patterns. The NFT collection includes digital artworks inspired by Carahunge and aims to raise awareness about the cultural heritage of Armenia. This collection is a unique opportunity for art and history enthusiasts to own a piece of digital memorabilia tied to this ancient site.

news.headline: Global laser cutting machine market set to grow by USD 1.45 billion (2024-2028) at 5.6% CAGR, driven by AI automation in metal cutting.

news.headline: Ero Copper Corp. restores full power at Tucumã Operation after a storms in Brazil; milling & flotation resumed.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 16, 2024, Ero Copper Corp. (TSX: ERO, NYSE: ERO) has announced that full power has been reinstated at its Tucumã Operation after a brief interruption due to a strong localized windstorm in the southwest area of the Carajás Mineral Province in Pará State, Brazil on October 5, 2024. Following the restoration of power, the Company has securely resumed the advancement of milling, flotation, and filtration circuits within the processing plant, ensuring operations are back on track.

news.headline: MasHash Cloud Mining: Offers beginner-friendly, profitable Bitcoin & Ethereum mining. No setup, $50 trial. Wide range of cryptos, cutting-edge tech, top-notch security.
news.summary: MasHash is a cloud mining platform launched in 2019 that allows users to mine cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Litecoin without the need for expensive hardware. Users can rent hash power from their data centers, eliminating setup, maintenance, and technical challenges. MasHash offers a wide range of cryptocurrencies to mine, cutting-edge mining technology using ASIC miners and GPU rigs, and top-notch security measures like offline cold wallets and McAfee® SECURE protection. With a $50 free trial for new sign-ups, MasHash is a user-friendly option for both beginners and experienced miners in 2024.

news.headline: Taiwan Semiconductor to announce earnings on 10/17, with estimated EPS of $1.80. Past quarter EPS beat led to 3.55% stock drop. Shares trading at $187.13, up 101.79% in 52 weeks. Analysts rate Outperform.
news.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor (NYSE:TSM) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on 2024-10-17 with an estimated EPS of $1.80, higher than the previous quarter's EPS of $1.48. Analysts are looking for positive guidance for the next quarter. In the last quarter, Taiwan Semiconductor beat EPS estimates by $0.10, resulting in a 3.55% drop in share price the following day. The stock's market performance includes trading at $187.13 on October 15, up 101.79% in the past year. Analysts rate Taiwan Semiconductor as Outperform based on 3 ratings. Market sentiment and guidance will likely impact stock price more than just an earnings beat or miss.

news.headline: CSX stock drops after Q3 results: Gaap earnings at 46 cents/share (missed 48 cents); revenue $3.62B (missed 3.676B est).
news.summary: CSX Corporation (NASDAQ:CSX) saw a decrease in its shares following the release of its third-quarter financial results. The company reported earnings of 46 cents per share, falling short of the expected 48 cents per share. Quarterly revenue amounted to $3.62 billion, also below the anticipated $3.676 billion. Despite these figures missing estimates, the company remains optimistic about its total revenue for the year. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sturm, Ruger & Co., Inc. (NYSE-RGR) to release Q3 2024 financial results on Oct. 30, with webcast on Oct. 31 at 9:00 am ET.

news.headline: DBM Global's subsidiaries Banker Steel and NYC Constructors complete Phase One of Terminal Six at JFK Airport, part of a $19 billion redevelopment project.
news.summary: In Phoenix on October 16, 2024, DBM Global Inc. subsidiaries Banker Steel and NYC Constructors LLC completed Phase One of John F. Kennedy International Airport's Terminal 6 by placing the final steel beam. This marks the successful fabrication and erection of structural steel for the redevelopment project. Terminal 6 is part of Port Authority of New York and New Jersey's $19 billion transformation of JFK Airport, which will feature two new terminals, the enhancement of two existing terminals, a new ground transportation center, and a revamped roadway network.

Kentucky Fertilizer unveils mini-lime & mini-gypsum pellets for turf industry, designed for soil health, pH levels.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, Caudill Seed's subsidiary, Kentucky Fertilizer, has introduced two groundbreaking products tailored for the turf sector: mini-lime pellets and mini-gypsum pellets. These new items are strategically developed to enhance soil health and enhance turf quality, targeting golf courses, sports fields, and professional landscapers. The mini-lime pellets are specifically designed to efficiently regulate soil pH levels for improved nutrient absorption.

This appointment reflects Hecla Mining Company's commitment to enhancing its board with diverse expertise.

news.summary: The approval of funding for the world's first major net-zero-emissions alcohol-to-jet production facility confirms the project's viability. This significant milestone demonstrates the project's credibility and potential in achieving carbon neutrality.

news.headline: Discover Financial Services beats Q3 earnings estimate with $3.69/share; 10.11% YoY revenue growth to $4.453 billion. Delinquency rates increase YOY.
news.summary: Discover Financial Services (NYSE:DFS) released its third-quarter financial results post Wednesday's market close. Their earnings of $3.69 per share surpassed the analyst consensus of $3.44. Quarterly revenue stood at $4.453 billion, exceeding the estimated $4.346 billion and marking a 10.11% increase from last year's $4.044 billion. The company reported 30+ days delinquency rates of 3.84%, up from 3.41% last year, and 90+ days delinquency rates of 1.87%, up from 1.57%. Notable was Digital Banking's pretax income of $1.2 billion for the quarter. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: FHLBank Chicago announces 2024 Director Election results.
news.summary: The outcome of the 2024 Director Election conducted by the Federal Home Loan Bank of Chicago (FHLBank Chicago) has been officially disclosed in Chicago.

news.headline: Amazon Teamsters and allies rally in Queens demanding recognition and negotiation of contract, aiming to stop union-busting at Amazon DBK4 warehouse today.
news.summary: In Queens, New York on October 16, 2024, the Teamsters union urged Amazon to engage in contract negotiations and cease activities aimed at undermining unions. A rally was organized at the Amazon DBK4 warehouse, where Amazon Teamsters, along with their supporters and elected representatives, gathered to press Amazon to acknowledge the demands of the workers.

news.headline: Montana Renewables gets $1.44B commitment from DOE to boost Renewable Fuels & Biomass Energy Facility by 300m gallons/year.

This expansion project follows an announcement made by Calumet, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLMT), stating that they have received approval from the U.S. Department of Energy's Loan Programs Office for the project. The development signifies a significant push towards sustainable aviation practices and reducing carbon footprint in the industry.

news.headline: Pennsylvania American Water gets $7.9M in PENNVEST loans, grant for infrastructure projects in Pittsburgh and Berks County.
news.summary: Pennsylvania American Water has been granted $7.9 million in low-interest funding from PENNVEST for two crucial infrastructure projects. This includes the substitution of lead service lines in Pittsburgh and repairs to the wastewater collection system in Exeter, Berks County. The Shapiro administration made the announcement, highlighting the company's dedication to offering top-quality services to its customers.
